sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Variable Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Player can control the height of their jump by holding the joystick upwards or downwards while pressing the jump button during side-scrolling segments

special_mechanics.name: Top-Down Stages
special_mechanics.description: Stages 2 and 5 are vertically-scrolling stages played from overhead perspective where player can move in eight directions

special_mechanics.name: Inclined Surfaces
special_mechanics.description: Inclined surfaces present in stages (not present in original Contra), affecting movement on slopes

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Sources document gameplay mechanics and features but do not provide quantitative physics values. Variable jump height confirmed as core mechanic. No ROM-level physics constants extracted from available documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super C (NES)
